title: Interviews on Enterprise Development in Kauhajoki 2013
description: The interview study focused on business life and entrepreneurship in Kauhajoki, Finland, from the 1950s to the 21th century. The data consist of interview transcripts. The interviewees were entrepreneurs, self-employed persons, experts, public officials and shop stewards who had had a significant role in the development of local businesses. The data were organised into an easy to use HTML version at FSD. The dataset is only available in Finnish.
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
